landing.hero_title: Put your geography reflexes to the test.
landing.hero_description: Atlas Guesser turns the world map into a fast quiz loop with flags, capitals and reverse prompts designed to sharpen your country knowledge.
landing.start_world_modal_description: Pick the mode you want, then jump straight into a round.
landing.start_subdivisions_modal_description: Select the admin map you want to play before starting.
landing.install_ios_hint: Open Safari's Share menu, then choose Add to Home Screen.
landing.install_mac_hint: In Safari, use File > Add to Dock to install Atlas Guesser like an app.
landing.stats_heading: Choose from six available game modes
landing.stats_description: Each mode trains a different geography skill: identify countries from flags, capitals, or names, and solve reverse rounds from highlighted countries.
landing.map_heading: Preview each guess directly on the world map
landing.map_description: The game map highlights your selection against the expected country so every round teaches location, shape and regional context.
landing.detail_heading: Review prompts, guesses and streak state
landing.detail_description: Each round summary keeps the prompt, answer, response time and mode details so you can spot patterns and improve faster.

sidebar.title: Axoune's Trips
sidebar.drag_handle_aria: Drag or tap to expand or collapse trips list

tripDetail.unselect_aria: Unselect this trip on the map
tripDetail.no_itinerary: No detailed itinerary available for this trip.
tripDetail.trip_not_found_desc: This trip could not be found.

stats.heading: Statistics
stats.metadata_description: Overall travel statistics: distances, countries and cities visited.

guesser.metadata_description: A world map quiz with flags, capitals and country recognition rounds.
guesser.feature_one_body: Show a flag and click the matching country directly on the world map.
guesser.feature_two_body: Use capitals or country names as prompts and answer on the same SVG map.
guesser.feature_three_body: Highlight a country on the map and choose the correct capital, country name or flag.
guesser.map_panel_body: Built from the shared world GeoJSON and filtered to {count} countries that remain clickable at this scale.
guesser.instruction_map: Click the correct country on the map.
guesser.instruction_choices: Pick the matching answer from the choices below.
guesser.prompt_flag_body: Find the country that matches this flag.
guesser.prompt_capital_body: Find the country for this capital city.
guesser.prompt_name_body: Find this country on the world map.
guesser.prompt_country_capital_body: Which capital belongs to the highlighted country?
guesser.prompt_country_name_body: Which country name matches the highlighted shape?
guesser.prompt_country_flag_body: Which flag belongs to the highlighted country?
guesser.result_idle_map: Answer by clicking a country on the map.
guesser.result_idle_choices: Answer by choosing one of the four options.
guesser.result_wrong: Not this time. The correct answer was <country>{countryName}</country>, with <capital>{capitalName}</capital> as its capital.
guesser.clear_scores_confirm: Reset the score on this device?

mode_moves.name-to-country: Where is this country on the map?

subdivisionsGuesser.metadata_description: A clickable administrative map quiz for {countryName}. Switch between the available levels and guess by borders.

prompt_body.departements: Find this department on the map of {countryName}.
prompt_body.regions: Find this region on the map of {countryName}.
prompt_body.laender: Find this federal state on the map of {countryName}.
prompt_body.states: Find this state on the map of {countryName}.
prompt_body.communities: Find this community on the map of {countryName}.
prompt_body.provinces: Find this province on the map of {countryName}.
prompt_body.subjects: Find this federal subject on the map of {countryName}.
prompt_body.federal_districts: Find this federal district on the map of {countryName}.

prompt_body_choices.departements: An area is highlighted on the map. Which department is it?
prompt_body_choices.regions: An area is highlighted on the map. Which region is it?
prompt_body_choices.laender: An area is highlighted on the map. Which federal state is it?
prompt_body_choices.states: An area is highlighted on the map. Which state is it?
prompt_body_choices.communities: An area is highlighted on the map. Which community is it?
prompt_body_choices.provinces: An area is highlighted on the map. Which province is it?
prompt_body_choices.subjects: An area is highlighted on the map. Which federal subject is it?
prompt_body_choices.federal_districts: An area is highlighted on the map. Which federal district is it?

subdivisionsGuesser.instruction_map: Click the matching border area on the map.
subdivisionsGuesser.instruction_choices: A highlighted area is shown on the map. Choose the correct name among 4 options.
subdivisionsGuesser.result_wrong: Not this time. The correct answer was {areaName}.

sources.modal_body: Administrative boundary datasets used to render this map.
sources.france_note: Administrative contours served via France's public geo APIs (IGN-backed).
sources.overseas_note: Bundled overseas extract used for the inset layout.
sources.unverified_note: Exact upstream source is not recorded in the repository history.

subdivisionsGuesser.clear_scores_confirm: Reset the score on this device?

admin.delete_trip_body: "{title}" will be permanently removed from the database.
admin.no_trips: No trips found. Create your first trip!
admin.save_error_required: Please fill in: ID, start date, end date, and title.
admin.stop_add_photos_requires_trip: Set the trip dates and route first to generate an ID before uploading photos.
admin.map_preview_hint: Preview of the itinerary on the world map.
admin.map_preview_empty: No geocoded steps yet. Save and enrich locations to render the route preview.
admin.map_preview_partial: {count} step(s) are missing coordinates and are not shown on the preview.
